name: tavern-highend
summary: An upscale tavern catering to merchants, officers, and minor nobility. Polished wood, private booths, a formal bar with rare bottles, a small stage for a lute duet. No brawls here.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: rectangle with booths lining walls, open floor for servers

accent.purpose: polished central floor or carpet runner

primary_palette.note: wine-bar-forward — rare vintages visible behind the counter
entertainment-forward — a harpist or duet, booths gathered toward the stage

story_prompts: diplomatic dinner — two factions at separate booths, a courier between them
quiet afternoon — one table of merchants closing a deal, bard playing softly
private party — the whole room rented out, guards at the door
closing — master polishing wine glasses while a cloaked stranger waits

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: warm refined light (0.5) — chandelier-lit with fire accent

anti_patterns: avoid common-tavern clutter — no spilled ale, no brawl debris
booths hug walls for privacy — don't place them mid-floor
the bar is for display as much as service — the back shelves must be visible
